personal.preferred_title: Senior Cloud Data Analytics / AWS Data Engineer

summary: Senior Cloud Data Analytics professional with 20+ years in enterprise data engineering. Expert in AWS Glue/S3/Redshift, PySpark ETL pipelines, Power BI dashboards, and data quality validation. Skilled in building scalable cloud data solutions for analytics and reporting.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines (Python/Pandas) for telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, supporting analytics and reporting.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform: S3 landing zone, Glue ETL, Redshift analytics, improving cloud forecasting workloads.
Developed and optimized SQL-based reporting layers and Power BI dashboards for executive metrics.
Implemented data validation and reconciliation processes to ensure pipeline accuracy and compliance.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring and real-time dashboarding.
Performed data analysis to optimize performance metrics and supported cloud readiness.

experience.title: SME CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Led enterprise-scale CA APM upgrades, dashboards, and alerts across 4,000+ agents.
Automated reporting using Perl/Ksh scripts, integrated with monitoring telemetry.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS Glue, S3, Redshift, Athena, ETL/ELT pipelines, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling, Data Quality

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed full serverless data platform with S3, Glue, Athena; implemented ETL pipelines and reporting dashboards, optimized data access and quality.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end agentic pipeline orchestrating job scoring, resume/cover generation, and quality gating.
